description_zh: Tiffany & Co.（蒂芙尼）是美国最具标志性的奢侈珠宝及银器品牌，由查尔斯·路易斯·蒂芙尼（Charles Lewis Tiffany）于1837年在纽约市创立，最初以文具和精品杂货店起家，后迅速转向珠宝和银器领域。蒂芙尼被誉为"钻石之王"，1886年推出的Tiffany Setting蒂芙尼六爪镶嵌订婚钻戒，将钻石高高托起于戒环之上，最大化展现了钻石的光芒，至今仍是全球最经典的钻戒款式。品牌的标志性知更鸟蛋蓝色（Tiffany Blue）以及白色缎带包装盒已成为全球通用的奢华与浪漫象征。1961年上映的经典电影《蒂芙尼的早餐》更是让品牌成为美国文化符号。蒂芙尼在银器工艺方面同样享有盛誉，其手工制作的纯银饰品和餐具深受精英阶层青睐。2021年，蒂芙尼被LVMH集团以158亿美元完成收购，归属于全球最大的奢侈品集团旗下。品牌产品覆盖珠宝、腕表、香水及居家配饰，在纽约第五大道的旗舰店是全球游客必访的地标。

languages.en: Tiffany & Co. is America's most iconic luxury jewelry and silverware brand, founded in 1837 by Charles Lewis Tiffany in New York City. Known as the 'King of Diamonds,' Tiffany revolutionized engagement rings in 1886 with the Tiffany Setting—a six-prong design that elevates the diamond above the band for maximum brilliance. Its signature Tiffany Blue color and white ribbon box are globally recognized symbols of luxury and romance. The brand's cultural status was cemented by the 1961 film Breakfast at Tiffany's. In 2021, Tiffany was acquired by LVMH for $15.8 billion. Beyond jewelry, the brand is celebrated for its craftsmanship in silverware, watches, fragrances, and home accessories. The flagship store on Fifth Avenue in New York remains one of the world's most visited luxury retail destinations.
